plugins.name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
plugins.description: AI agents v14.0.0 — Plan-first readiness, parallel execution via git worktrees, continuous autonomous mode with stacked PRs, dual-agent QA, opt-in telemetry, gate-event webhooks. The /autonomous orchestration shell graduates to a default multi-iteration loop (cap 10, default 3) with stacked-branch semantics — iteration N+1 branches from iterations[N].branch, producing a reviewable bottom-up PR stack (reviewers must merge bottom-of-stack first). Restore v13 cadence with --no-stacked-branches; reproduce v13's single-iter default with --max-iterations 1. New flags: --notify enables opt-in gate-event webhooks (rubric, adjudication, NO-GO, Plan Review FAIL × 3) gated on AI_AGENT_MANAGER_WEBHOOK_URL with jq-only injection-safe payloads; --non-interactive-fallback enables a per-gate fail-closed policy for CI / unattended runs. Supervisor gains --base-branch + --non-interactive flags plus Phase 0/4/4.5 base-mismatch detection + cleanup, and emits optional additive branch_base + pr_state fields on SUPERVISOR_RESULT. Context-Keeper gains atomic set_flag / get_flag / clear_flag operations. AUTONOMOUS_RUN bumps to schema_version 2 with nine new closed status_reason values covering stacked-branch / non-interactive-fallback / gh-retry / no-rubric paths (see docs/RESULT_SCHEMAS.md). W-NEW-3 spike PASSED pre-merge: Code Reviewer + Rubric Grader honor DIFF-SCOPE OVERRIDE on stacked-branch fixtures. v14 is additive on top of v13: no new agent, no hook count change in v14.0.0 (still 14). v14.1.0 adds the notification surface — PreToolUse[AskUserQuestion] + Notification hooks driving desktop banners and a send-webhook.sh paused-event path (with .supervisor/notify-config.json fallback and ntfy-aware payload), bringing the hook count 14 → 17. v14.2.0 adds the concurrency/resume layer — the LAUNCH_PAD_RESULT schema (validated by scripts/validate-launch-pad-result.py) makes saved_brief_path the primary /autonomous brief-detection signal, retiring the fragile ls-diff footgun; plus session-resume.sh SessionStart rehydration — adding 2 hooks (count 17 → 19). v14.2.1 is a correctness patch: send-webhook.sh (supervisor_result path) and send-telemetry-core.sh now read the finishing subagent's output from the real SubagentStop fields (last_assistant_message, then legacy inline names, then the agent_transcript_path / transcript_path JSONL) instead of the non-existent top-level result_block, which had silently suppressed every supervisor-completion webhook and telemetry post since v14.1.0 — no hook-count / schema / agent change. v14.2.2 rounds out the notification surface (patch): notify-desktop.sh adds burst debounce (AI_AGENT_MANAGER_NOTIFY_DEBOUNCE, default 5s) and Linux DISPLAY/WAYLAND_DISPLAY channel-detection (skips notify-send on headless), and /autonomous --notify fails loud when no webhook URL is resolvable (env var or .supervisor/notify-config.json); no hook-count / schema / agent change (still 19 hooks). Preserves all v13.0.0 / v13.0.1 capabilities (foreground-assisted gates, rubric-gate user-merge verification, Option C inter_subtask_gap re-plan, webhook empty-payload suppression). Preserves all v12.2.0 / v12.1.0 / v12.0.0 capabilities (Agent Teams graduation, Outcomes Rubric, /dreaming, opt-in SubagentStop webhook hook, Memory Tool, Structured Outputs, provides/requires contracts, pre-spawn verification, 4-option adjudication, effort-tier discipline, WORKER_RESULT schema_version 2) and prior v11/v10 layers. 13 agent roles, 50 reusable skills, 19 quality gate hooks, 12 slash commands, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
